data.name: Voyeur Villa - Living with Monster Girls Edition
data.detailed_description:
Become the owner of a Villa, hosting multiple monster girls; engage with them through kinky dialogues, satisfy their needs, so they can satisfy yours: the girls will earn their keep as they are starred in erotic shows with you for viewers of all kinds coming from all across the world just to watch a good show before retiring to their rooms to sleep for the night. Upgrade your Villa through the gold you earn from these shows and rise to the rank of legends with your Villa

Manage your Villa

As your Villa grows, various monster girls arrive, wanting nothing more than a cozy place to live in. Make sure they never slack off, managing their training and resting times to bring them to the best shape, while saving some energy for the nightly erotic shows! Satisfied guests open new opportunities, allowing you to hire more girls, to be placed in more spots, unlocking cute and sexy outfits.

Chat with the Girls

By flirting with the girls, and learning about their needs and personalities, giving them gifts and taking them on dates, you earn their trust, unlocking you new H-scenes, the animations in them becoming available for you during the erotic shows, to be used on any and all of your girls.

Erotic Shows

Guests will arrive at the doorstep of your establishment, thirsty to see a good show you'd put up with the girls. They each come with different tastes and it is your task as the boss to arrange them into groups of threes, where their tastes synergize, allowing you to satisfy the most of them at the same time. Doing so allows you to gain great rewards: more outfits, money to upgrade your Villa, drawing in more important and well paying guests, raising the challenge level.

40+ H-scenes

Pile memories of private, sexy fun times with your harem of girls inside your gallery.

Achievements, Tasks

Reaching milestones in your progress will unlock precious rewards, while random tasks encourage a varied gameplay.

data.short_description: Travelers gather at your doors, looking to see sexy monster girls in action, starring you and your staff full of cute, exhibitionistic monster girls. Grow your Villa through the nightly shows, carefully orchestrated to fit the guests' viewing desires!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: INTEL® Pentium Dual Core G3250
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any with dx11 support
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX9c compliant
